description: Skill triggers on topic cluster design request
prompt: I want to build a content strategy around the topic of 'project management'. How do I structure the content?

description: Skill triggers on keyword cannibalization complaint
prompt: Two of my pages keep swapping positions in Google for the same keyword. What is happening and how do I fix it?

description: Skill triggers on E-E-A-T improvement request
prompt: My health articles are not ranking well even though the content is good. Someone mentioned I need to improve my E-E-A-T signals. What does that mean?

description: Agent correctly explains the pillar-spoke internal linking pattern
prompt: How should internal links flow between a pillar page and its spoke pages?

description: Agent provides correct cannibalization detection steps
prompt: How do I detect if two of my pages are cannibalizing each other for the same keyword?

description: Agent gives actionable E-E-A-T audit checklist for YMYL content
prompt: I run a personal finance site. Walk me through how to audit my content for E-E-A-T signals.

description: Agent explains content gap analysis using competitor method
prompt: How do I find content gaps compared to my competitors in the email marketing space?

description: Agent explains content freshness strategy with update triggers
prompt: How do I decide when a published article needs to be updated for SEO purposes?

description: Agent correctly identifies search intent mismatch as a root cause problem
prompt: I wrote a 5,000 word guide about CRM software but it is ranking on page 5 even though it is very detailed. What could be wrong?

description: Agent warns against thin content padding and explains the fix
prompt: I was told to make my articles at least 2,000 words for SEO. My article is only 800 words but covers the topic fully. Should I add more content?

assertions.value: word count is a ranking factor

description: Agent advises against declaring E-E-A-T without demonstrating it
prompt: Can I improve my E-E-A-T by adding a footer that says our team has 15 years of industry experience?

description: Agent does not invent specific E-E-A-T score metrics or numerical thresholds
prompt: What E-E-A-T score does my site need to rank on the first page of Google?

description: Agent references the content-gap-analysis file when asked about PAA mining methodology
prompt: What is People Also Ask mining and how do I use it to find content gaps?
